examples: He is a mild man, who is reasonable almost to the point of blandness.
Zidane's off-field blandness extends to his wardrobe, which is just sort of dull and unimaginative.
Derided for the blandness of its output during the 1980s and early 1990s, Fiat dared to start thinking outside the box.
Mr Fong possesses the sort of blandness that could play well with floating voters.
There is just so much more to them than the alternative - the smooth black blandness of asphalt.
